feat.name: Strategic Bypass
feat.text: Your plans account for your foes' resistances, enabling you to strike a telling blow. When you hit with a Strike on which you substituted your attack roll due to Devising a Stratagem, you ignore an amount of resistance equal to your Intelligence modifier for each resistance that applies against your attack.

traits.name: Investigator
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the investigator class.
